title: Patio renovation — Myers Park, Charlotte NC
description: 15-year-old stone patio — pressure washed, joints re-sanded with polymer sand. Looked brand new again.

title: Sunken paver repair — pulled, re-leveled, washed
description: Pulled the settled pavers, re-leveled the base, washed clean. The after speaks for itself.

title: Custom concrete patio with brick soldier-course border
description: Custom-poured concrete patio with brick border. Sealed and color-coated.

title: Polymer sand joints — locked and crisp
description: Fresh polymer sand swept into clean joints. Locks the surface and keeps weeds out for years.

title: Curved paver walkway — pressure washed and re-sanded
description: Same path, washed and re-sanded. Weeds and grime gone.

title: Garden gate walkway — through the gate, joint by joint
description: Color back, joints locked, weeds out.

title: Pressure washed walkway — Charlotte NC
description: Weed-choked joints cleaned out. Color brought back.

title: Vinyl privacy fence — full panel install
description: Full vinyl privacy panel install with corner post. Plumbed true.

title: Vinyl panel + custom gate
description: Tight gap, true plumb. Clean hardware.

title: Custom wood gate — treated pine
description: New treated pine slotted into existing stained fence. Custom fit, built to last.

title: Japanese maple + boxwoods — new install
description: Fresh install — Japanese maple, boxwoods, natural mulch, clean established lines.

title: Hydrangea bed — stone edging
description: Stone edging set, hydrangeas planted, ready for summer.
